what_it_does: This file is a JSON allocation batch manifest that lists six code/design substrate entries for the claude-ds project, each identified by a path relative to a common root directory.
observations: All six entries share project 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
Every listed path lives in the 'atomicity/' subdirectory
There are no extracted code symbols or additional metadata fields beyond project, path, and root
The file is named as wave-002 allocation batch-017
standouts: The batch groups a small set of atomicity-related files spanning components, pages, ingestion, and kit modules
It pairs an absolute filesystem root with relative file paths
concerns: symbols[] is empty even though the listed files are code/design substrates
No selection rationale or batch criteria are recorded
No versioning or timestamp metadata is present
conventions: JSON array-of-objects shape for ledger entries
Absolute root path combined with relative asset paths
notes: A wave-002 allocation batch that enumerates six claude-ds atomicity files for downstream interpretation.
questions: What criteria determined these six files belong to batch-017?
Why is symbols[] empty for files that likely contain code symbols?
Is 'atomicity' a design-system sub-package or a generic folder?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an allocation manifest and it does exactly that: it lists selected substrates with project and root context.
intention_signals: It seems to be TRYING to package a focused slice of the claude-ds atomicity layer so an interpretive pipeline can process or fuse it in batch 017 of wave 002.
novelty: It treats design/code files as ledger entries with an absolute root, rather than embedding raw source content.
contribution: It contributes a normalized, minimal set of file references that a fused system can use to locate and load the corresponding claude-ds atomicity substrates.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch manifest listing six claude-ds files under the atomicity directory with project and root references.
intention_for_embedding: To register a specific set of atomicity substrates for batch interpretation in wave-002.
